use_codes.desc: ASSESSMENT OF BRONCHIAL HYPERRESPONSIVENESS IN PATIENTS 6 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER WHO DO NOT HAVE CLINICALLY APPARENT ASTHMA

indications.text:
ARIDOL is indicated for the assessment of bronchial hyperresponsiveness in adult and pediatric
patients 6 years of age or older who do not have clinically apparent asthma.
Limitations of Use:
ARIDOL is not a standalone test or a screening test for asthma. Bronchial challenge testing with
